title: Liquid Banking on Hyperliquid with Hyperbeat
summary_title: Trade, spend, borrow against Bitcoin—all from one non-custodial account
summary_description: HyperBeat's liquid banking lets you deposit native Bitcoin, spend it as credit, trade perps, and access 8+ currencies without trusting anyone.

key_moments.label: HyperBeat origin: early traders who lost money, then built vaults
Liquid banking defined: unified account for trading, spending, credit—all non-custodial
The problem: traders forced to withdraw to Arbitrum, then to CEX to spend
New users from Turkey, Singapore, Vietnam discovering HyperLiquid via liquid banking onramps
Wealth preservation: hold HyperLiquid, borrow against it—rich people don't sell assets
Fees: 0.12% onramp/offramp for USD/EUR, up to 0.4% for other currencies
Referral incentives: 25% of treasury yield from friends' deposits—scalable, not points
Native Bitcoin deposits permissionless via Unit; spend on credit without knowing HyperVM

pull_quote: Rich people don't sell their assets, they just borrow against them—now easily accessible to normal people for the first time.
